title: Senior Frontend Developer
description: Build and maintain cutting-edge web applications using modern JavaScript frameworks. Lead frontend architecture decisions and mentor junior developers.
requirements: 5+ years of frontend development experience. Strong proficiency in React, TypeScript, and modern CSS. Experience with state management and performance optimization.

title: Backend Engineer
description: Design and implement scalable microservices architecture. Work with distributed systems and cloud-native technologies to handle millions of requests.
requirements: 4+ years backend development. Proficiency in Node.js or Python. Experience with databases, message queues, and containerization.

title: Full-Stack Developer
description: Develop end-to-end features for our SaaS platform. Collaborate with product and design teams to deliver exceptional user experiences.
requirements: 3+ years full-stack experience. Proficiency in React and Node.js. Experience with SQL and NoSQL databases.

title: Data Scientist
description: Apply machine learning and statistical methods to extract insights from large datasets. Build predictive models and drive data-informed decision making.
requirements: MS/PhD in Statistics, CS, or related field. 3+ years experience with ML/AI. Strong programming skills in Python.

title: DevOps Engineer
description: Automate infrastructure provisioning and deployment pipelines. Ensure high availability and security of cloud environments.
requirements: 4+ years DevOps experience. Expert in CI/CD, containerization, and cloud platforms. Strong scripting skills.

title: UI/UX Designer
description: Create beautiful and intuitive user interfaces for web and mobile applications. Conduct user research and translate insights into compelling designs.
requirements: 3+ years UI/UX design experience. Proficiency in Figma and Adobe Creative Suite. Strong portfolio demonstrating design thinking.

title: Machine Learning Engineer
description: Develop and deploy production ML models. Research and implement state-of-the-art algorithms for computer vision and NLP applications.
requirements: MS/PhD in ML/AI. 3+ years building production ML systems. Strong background in deep learning frameworks.

title: iOS Developer
description: Build high-quality iOS applications using Swift and SwiftUI. Implement complex features with smooth animations and excellent performance.
requirements: 4+ years iOS development. Expert in Swift and SwiftUI. Published apps on the App Store.

title: Android Developer
description: Develop native Android applications with Kotlin and Jetpack Compose. Optimize app performance and ensure compatibility across devices.
requirements: 3+ years Android development. Strong Kotlin skills. Experience with Android architecture components.

title: Cloud Architect
description: Design and implement enterprise cloud solutions. Lead cloud migration strategies and ensure architectural best practices across teams.
requirements: 7+ years IT experience with 4+ in cloud. AWS/Azure/GCP certifications. Experience with enterprise architecture frameworks.

title: Cybersecurity Analyst
description: Monitor and analyze security threats. Conduct vulnerability assessments and implement security controls to protect organizational assets.
requirements: 3+ years cybersecurity experience. CISSP or CEH certification preferred. Knowledge of SIEM tools and incident response.

title: Product Manager
description: Drive product strategy and roadmap for B2B SaaS products. Work cross-functionally with engineering, design, and marketing teams.
requirements: 5+ years product management experience. Strong analytical skills. Experience with agile methodologies and data-driven decision making.

title: Data Engineer
description: Build and maintain data pipelines that process terabytes of data daily. Design data warehousing solutions and ensure data quality.
requirements: 4+ years data engineering experience. Expert in SQL and Python. Experience with big data technologies.

title: React Native Developer
description: Build cross-platform mobile applications using React Native. Deliver native-like experiences on both iOS and Android platforms.
requirements: 3+ years React Native experience. Strong JavaScript/TypeScript skills. Published apps on both app stores.

title: Digital Marketing Manager
description: Lead digital marketing campaigns across multiple channels. Manage SEO, SEM, social media, and email marketing strategies to drive growth.
requirements: 5+ years digital marketing experience. Proficiency in Google Analytics, Google Ads, and social media platforms. Strong analytical mindset.

title: Financial Analyst
description: Perform financial modeling and analysis to support business decisions. Create reports, forecasts, and valuations for strategic initiatives.
requirements: 3+ years financial analysis experience. Strong Excel and financial modeling skills. CFA or MBA preferred.

title: QA Automation Engineer
description: Design and implement test automation frameworks. Write comprehensive test suites to ensure software quality and reliability.
requirements: 3+ years QA automation experience. Proficiency in Selenium, Cypress, or Playwright. Strong programming skills.

title: Blockchain Developer
description: Develop smart contracts and decentralized applications. Build DeFi protocols and contribute to blockchain infrastructure.
requirements: 3+ years blockchain development. Expert in Solidity and Web3.js. Understanding of DeFi protocols and tokenomics.

title: Technical Writer
description: Create comprehensive technical documentation for developer tools and APIs. Write tutorials, guides, and reference materials.
requirements: 3+ years technical writing experience. Ability to understand and explain complex technical concepts. Experience with docs-as-code tools.

title: Systems Administrator
description: Manage and maintain enterprise IT infrastructure. Ensure system availability, security, and optimal performance across network environments.
requirements: 4+ years sysadmin experience. Strong Linux and Windows Server knowledge. Networking and virtualization expertise.

title: Game Developer
description: Create immersive gaming experiences using Unity or Unreal Engine. Implement gameplay mechanics, AI, and multiplayer systems.
requirements: 3+ years game development. Proficiency in C# or C++. Experience with game engines and 3D mathematics.

title: Embedded Systems Engineer
description: Design and develop firmware for embedded systems. Work on IoT devices with real-time operating systems and low-level hardware interfaces.
requirements: 4+ years embedded systems experience. Expert in C/C++. Knowledge of RTOS, communication protocols, and PCB design.

title: Scrum Master
description: Facilitate agile ceremonies and remove impediments for development teams. Coach teams on Scrum best practices and continuous improvement.
requirements: 3+ years Scrum Master experience. CSM or PSM certification. Experience with multiple agile frameworks.

title: Database Administrator
description: Manage and optimize database systems for high-traffic applications. Ensure data integrity, backup strategies, and performance tuning.
requirements: 4+ years DBA experience. Expert in PostgreSQL and MySQL. Experience with database replication and high availability.

title: Growth Hacker
description: Drive user acquisition and retention through creative, data-driven experiments. Optimize funnels and find scalable growth channels.
requirements: 3+ years growth marketing experience in startups. Strong analytical skills. Experience with product-led growth strategies.

title: Site Reliability Engineer
description: Ensure reliability and scalability of production systems. Build tooling for monitoring, alerting, and automated incident response.
requirements: 4+ years SRE or DevOps experience. Strong programming skills. Experience with observability and infrastructure as code.

title: Content Strategist
description: Develop and execute content strategies that drive engagement and conversions. Create editorial calendars and manage content production.
requirements: 3+ years content strategy experience. Excellent writing skills. Experience with CMS platforms and SEO.

title: Salesforce Developer
description: Customize and extend Salesforce platform capabilities. Build Lightning components, Apex triggers, and integrations with external systems.
requirements: 3+ years Salesforce development. Platform Developer I/II certification. Experience with Lightning Web Components.

title: Computer Vision Engineer
description: Develop computer vision algorithms for autonomous systems. Work on object detection, segmentation, and 3D reconstruction pipelines.
requirements: MS/PhD in Computer Vision or related. 3+ years industry experience. Strong background in deep learning for vision.

title: HR Business Partner
description: Partner with business leaders to align HR strategy with organizational goals. Drive talent management, employee engagement, and culture initiatives.
requirements: 5+ years HR experience. SHRM-CP or PHR certification preferred. Strong interpersonal and conflict resolution skills.

title: Graphic Designer
description: Create visually compelling designs for digital and print media. Develop brand identities and marketing collateral for diverse clients.
requirements: 3+ years graphic design experience. Expert in Adobe Creative Suite. Strong portfolio showcasing diverse design work.

title: Rust Developer
description: Build high-performance systems software in Rust. Work on compilers, databases, or networking infrastructure with a focus on safety and speed.
requirements: 3+ years Rust experience. Strong understanding of systems programming. Experience with async runtime and memory management.

title: Business Intelligence Analyst
description: Build dashboards and reports that drive business decisions. Transform raw data into actionable insights using BI tools and SQL.
requirements: 3+ years BI experience. Proficiency in Tableau or Power BI. Strong SQL skills and business acumen.

title: Solutions Architect
description: Design technical solutions for complex business problems. Lead proof-of-concept development and provide architectural guidance to client teams.
requirements: 8+ years software development with 3+ in architecture. Cloud certifications preferred. Strong communication and presentation skills.

title: Natural Language Processing Engineer
description: Build NLP systems including chatbots, text classification, and language generation models. Fine-tune large language models for domain-specific applications.
requirements: MS/PhD in NLP or Computational Linguistics. 3+ years NLP experience. Expertise in transformer architectures.

title: Supply Chain Analyst
description: Optimize supply chain operations through data analysis and forecasting. Identify bottlenecks and implement process improvements.
requirements: 3+ years supply chain analysis. Proficiency in Excel and ERP systems. Knowledge of logistics and inventory management.

title: Golang Developer
description: Build high-performance backend services in Go. Work on distributed systems, APIs, and real-time data processing pipelines.
requirements: 3+ years Go development. Experience with concurrent programming and distributed systems. Knowledge of gRPC and protocol buffers.

title: Mechanical Engineer
description: Design and develop mechanical components and assemblies. Perform FEA analysis and oversee prototyping and manufacturing processes.
requirements: 3+ years mechanical engineering experience. Proficiency in SolidWorks or AutoCAD. Knowledge of manufacturing processes.

title: Electrical Engineer
description: Design electronic circuits and PCBs for consumer devices. Work on power systems, signal processing, and hardware-software integration.
requirements: 3+ years electrical engineering. Proficiency in PCB design tools. Experience with analog and digital circuit design.

title: Civil Engineer
description: Design and oversee construction of infrastructure projects including roads, bridges, and buildings. Ensure compliance with building codes and standards.
requirements: PE license required. 4+ years civil engineering experience. Proficiency in AutoCAD Civil 3D and structural analysis.

title: Pharmacist
description: Dispense medications and provide pharmaceutical care. Counsel patients on medication use, side effects, and drug interactions.
requirements: PharmD degree and valid pharmacy license. 2+ years experience preferred. Strong clinical knowledge and patient care skills.

title: Registered Nurse
description: Provide direct patient care in a hospital setting. Perform assessments, administer medications, and coordinate with healthcare teams.
requirements: BSN and active RN license. BLS/ACLS certification. 2+ years clinical experience preferred.

title: Accountant
description: Manage accounts, prepare financial statements, and ensure regulatory compliance. Handle bookkeeping, tax preparation, and auditing duties.
requirements: CPA preferred. 3+ years accounting experience. Proficiency in accounting software and strong attention to detail.

title: Video Editor
description: Edit videos for social media, advertisements, and corporate content. Create motion graphics and manage post-production workflows.
requirements: 3+ years video editing experience. Expert in Premiere Pro and After Effects. Understanding of storytelling and pacing.

title: Legal Counsel
description: Provide legal advice on corporate matters, contracts, and regulatory compliance. Draft and review agreements, handle dispute resolution.
requirements: JD and bar admission. 5+ years corporate law experience. Strong negotiation and analytical skills.

title: Architect
description: Design innovative commercial and residential buildings. Create conceptual designs, construction documents, and oversee project execution.
requirements: Licensed architect. 5+ years experience. Proficiency in Revit and AutoCAD. LEED certification preferred.

title: Biotechnology Research Scientist
description: Conduct research in molecular biology and genetic engineering. Design experiments, analyze data, and contribute to drug discovery programs.
requirements: PhD in Biology, Biochemistry, or related field. 2+ years research experience. Strong laboratory and analytical skills.

title: Environmental Consultant
description: Assess environmental impact for construction and industrial projects. Conduct site assessments, prepare environmental reports, and ensure regulatory compliance.
requirements: 3+ years environmental consulting. Knowledge of EPA regulations. Experience with environmental impact assessments.

title: Executive Assistant
description: Provide high-level administrative support to C-suite executives. Manage calendars, coordinate travel, prepare presentations, and handle confidential information.
requirements: 5+ years executive assistant experience. Exceptional organizational skills. Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite.

title: Chef / Culinary Director
description: Lead kitchen operations and create innovative menus. Manage food quality, inventory, and kitchen staff while maintaining high culinary standards.
requirements: Culinary degree or equivalent experience. 5+ years in professional kitchens. Strong leadership and creativity.
